title: Lead Priority Routing
description: Build a workflow that ingests a lead JSON via webhook, normalizes fields, routes urgent leads to email + Slack HTTP notification, sends standard leads to Google Sheets, merges both branches, consolidates with a Code node, and responds to the webhook.

exam_blueprint.title: Design workflow skeleton
exam_blueprint.instructions: Include webhook intake, normalization, conditional routing, integrations, merge, code consolidation, response, and DNG Submit Level as last required step.

exam_blueprint.title: Connect branches and merge
exam_blueprint.instructions: Wire urgent vs standard branches into Merge, then Code, Respond to Webhook, then DNG Submit Level.

exam_blueprint.title: Finalize configuration
exam_blueprint.instructions: Tune IF condition on priority, outbound URLs, sheet append, merge mode append, consolidation logic, and DNG Submit challengeId.
